[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / asciiFramebuffer

# Accessor: asciiFramebuffer

## Get Signature

```ts
get asciiFramebuffer(): 
  | TextmodeFramebuffer
  | undefined;
```

Framebuffer containing this layer's rendered textmode output.

### Returns

  \| [`TextmodeFramebuffer`](../../../../../classes/TextmodeFramebuffer.md)
  \| `undefined`
